name: recently_added
description: Recently Added view for Volumio's local music library — uses MPD's built-in modified-since query
author: Zhapox

volumio_info.details: Adds a 'Recently Added' entry to the Browse menu showing albums added to your library within configurable time windows. Reads directly from MPD's database — no separate index, no watcher, no native modules.
volumio_info.changelog: v0.5.0: configurable sort order for albums and artists. Two new settings under Display: Albums sort (Newest first / Alphabetical) and Artists sort (Newest first / Alphabetical), each defaulting to Newest first. The Albums setting also applies to the album list inside artist drill-downs. Track ordering within an album is unchanged (always disc/track number). Alphabetical artist sort pins the Unknown Artist sentinel to the end. All new strings translated across all seven supported languages. v0.4.4: README install instructions now recommend the 'volumio plugin install' CLI.
